ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fish" (
  "fish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "tag_code" TEXT /* Unique code assigned to the tag */,
  "mark_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the mark data */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "mark_run_name" TEXT /* Name of the marking run */,
  "mark_rear_type_name" TEXT /* Type of rearing (e.g., Wild Fish or Natural Production) */,
  "mark_date" TEXT /* Date when the fish was marked */,
  "mark_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the marking site */,
  "mark_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the marking site */,
  "release_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the release site */,
  "release_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the release site */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the fish was released */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the fish (in cm) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the fish (in grams) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the fish (e.g., Male, Female, Unknown) */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag used (e.g., Acoustic, RFID) */,
  "tag_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the tag */,
  "tag_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag is expected to expire */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the fish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_mark_site_code_value FOREIGN KEY ("mark_site_code_value") REFERENCES mark_sites ("mark_site_code_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_release_site_code_value FOREIGN KEY ("release_site_code_value") REFERENCES release_sites ("release_site_code_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "mark_sites" (
  "mark_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marking site */,
  "mark_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the marking site */,
  "mark_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the marking site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the marking site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the marking site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the marking site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the marking site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the marking site (in meters) */,
  "water_body" TEXT /* Name of the water body where the marking site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of marking site (e.g., Trap, Hatchery) */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the marking site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mark_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_sites" (
  "release_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release site */,
  "release_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the release site */,
  "release_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the release site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the release site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the release site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the release site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the release site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the release site (in meters) */,
  "water_body" TEXT /* Name of the water body where the release site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of release site (e.g., Trap, Hatchery) */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the release site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_sites" (
  "event_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event site */,
  "event_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the event site */,
  "event_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the event site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event site */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the event site */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the event site */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the event site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the event site (in meters) */,
  "water_body" TEXT /* Name of the water body where the event site is located */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of event site (e.g., Trap, Hatchery) */,
  "site_manager" TEXT /* Name of the site manager */,
  "site_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the event type is critical */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "detection_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detection event */,
  "fish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fish involved in the event */,
  "event_site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event site */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "event_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the detection event */,
  "event_release_site_code_value" TEXT /* Code of the release site (if applicable) */,
  "event_release_site_name" TEXT /* Name of the release site (if applicable) */,
  "event_release_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the release (if applicable) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the detection event (in seconds) */,
  "water_temperature" TEXT /* Water temperature at the time of the event (in °C) */,
  "water_salinity" TEXT /* Water salinity at the time of the event (in PSU) */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the detection event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_events_fish_id FOREIGN KEY ("fish_id") REFERENCES fish ("fish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_detection_events_event_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_site_id") REFERENCES event_sites ("event_site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antennas" (
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna */,
  "antenna_name" TEXT /* Name of the antenna */,
  "antenna_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna group */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the antenna */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date of installation */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the antenna */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the antenna */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the antenna (in meters) */,
  "water_body" TEXT /* Name of the water body where the antenna is located */,
  "antenna_type" TEXT /* Type of antenna (e.g., Acoustic, RFID) */,
  "antenna_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the antenna */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antenna_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antennas_antenna_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("antenna_group_id") REFERENCES antenna_groups ("antenna_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antenna_groups" (
  "antenna_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna group */,
  "antenna_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the antenna group */,
  "configuration_value" INTEGER /* Configuration value for the antenna group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the antenna group */,
  "group_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the antenna group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antenna_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antenna_event_details" (
  "event_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event detail */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the detection event */,
  "antenna_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna involved in the event */,
  "cth_count" INTEGER /* Count of CTH (Continuous Time History) for the event */,
  "signal_strength" TEXT /* Signal strength of the detection (in dB) */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the antenna at the time of the event (in %) */,
  "event_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the event detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antenna_event_details_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES detection_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antenna_event_details_antenna_id FOREIGN KEY ("antenna_id") REFERENCES antennas ("antenna_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID or name of the resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
